proposals.evidence_quote: It is blood I need, not water. Tyrion's blood, the blood of the valonqar.
proposals.note: Target event node 'valonqar-kills-cersei' may not yet exist — gated on TWOW/future events. Hold as candidate.

proposals.evidence_quote: The valonqar shall wrap his hands about your throat... fingers dug deep into her neck
proposals.note: Same target as q529. Nightmare version of the same foreshadowing beat — stronger sensory imagery.

proposals.evidence_quote: Skulls. A thousand skulls, and the bastard boy again. Jon Snow.
proposals.note: jon-snow-assassination event node exists (or should exist as the stabbing at Castle Black, ADWD Jon XIII). Melisandre-POV FORESHADOWS that event.

proposals.evidence_quote: It sounds like a wolf, thought Sansa. A ghost wolf, big as mountains.
proposals.note: No clean named target event node yet. The 'ghost wolf' image likely foreshadows Sansa's Stark-identity resurgence and/or the direwolf pack's role in TWOW. Hold — do not mint a FORESHADOWS edge until the target is named.

proposals.evidence_quote: If he dares mention gold, I will deal with this one as I did the last and find a pious eight-year-old to wear the crystal crown.
proposals.note: Cersei's contempt for the High Sparrow at the moment she should fear him most; foreshadows her arrest. Target event node 'cersei-arrested-by-faith' may need minting.
